# Generated Plots

This directory contains all PNG plots generated by the project's
visualisation pipeline.  Each entry below links the output file to the
function that produces it.

## Plotly plots (generated by `python main.py assets`)

These are produced by [`src/vis/plots.py`](../../src/vis/plots.py).

| File | Function | Description |
|------|----------|-------------|
| `hits_comparison.png` | `plot_hits_comparison()` | Grouped bar chart — Hits@50 for every method × scale |
| `scale_heatmap.png` | `plot_scale_heatmap()` | Heatmap matrix — methods vs. scales |
| `runtime_comparison.png` | `plot_runtime_comparison()` | Grouped bar chart — wall-clock seconds per config |
| `memory_comparison.png` | `plot_memory_comparison()` | Grouped bar chart — peak RSS memory per config |
| `runtime_vs_accuracy.png` | `plot_runtime_vs_accuracy()` | Scatter plot — runtime vs. Hits@50 (bubble = scale) |
| `training_curve_*.png` | `plot_training_curves()` | Per-method, per-scale training & validation loss/accuracy curves |
| `multi_seed_box.png` | `plot_multi_seed_box()` | Box + scatter plot — GCN multi-seed distribution |

## Matplotlib / LaTeX figures (generated by `python latex/gen_plots.py`)

These are produced by [`latex/gen_plots.py`](../../latex/gen_plots.py) and
saved as PDFs in [`latex/figures/`](../../latex/figures/) for the LaTeX
report.

| File (in `latex/figures/`) | Function | Description |
|-----------------------------|----------|-------------|
| `fig1_dataset.pdf` | `make_fig1_dataset()` | Dataset overview — splits, scales, quick facts |
| `fig2_hits_comparison.pdf` | `make_fig2_hits_comparison()` | Grouped bar chart — Hits@50 × method × scale |
| `fig3_scale_analysis.pdf` | `make_fig3_scale_analysis()` | Performance-vs-scale lines + GCN/CN ratio |
| `fig4_multiseed.pdf` | `make_fig4_multiseed()` | GCN multi-seed scatter ± std + CN reference |

## Legacy plots (kept for reference)

| File | Notes |
|------|-------|
| `hits_at_50_comparison.png` | Previous matplotlib version — replaced by `hits_comparison.png` |
